channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-25 19:46 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 beta1 (single agent) just took the #4 spot on Text Arena, scoring 1492 - Outperforming GPT...
item.description: Grok 4.20 beta1 (single agent) just took the #4 spot on Text Arena, scoring 1492 - Outperforming GPT-5.2 and closing the gap to Gemini 3.1 Pro This is just the single-agent version. The full 4-agent system available on Grok is significantly more powerful

item.title: @elonmusk: "A little understanding between us" and the world will be so much more pleasant. Grok Imagine
item.description: "A little understanding between us" and the world will be so much more pleasant. Grok Imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: The side with the best sense of humor are the good guys. Grok ftw.
item.description: The side with the best sense of humor are the good guys. Grok ftw.

item.title: @elonmusk: Cybertruck steel is bulletproof to any handgun, shotgun or Tommy Gun
item.description: Cybertruck steel is bulletproof to any handgun, shotgun or Tommy Gun

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla self-driving makes traffic and long drives painless
item.description: Tesla self-driving makes traffic and long drives painless

item.title: @elonmusk: People don’t want woke AI. They want AI that tells them the truth.
item.description: People don’t want woke AI. They want AI that tells them the truth.

item.title: @elonmusk: How to create amazing images with Grok Imagine. You can also ask@Grokto generate image and video pro...
item.description: How to create amazing images with Grok Imagine. You can also ask@Grokto generate image and video prompts.

item.title: @elonmusk: Make Them Speak No Zombie Filibuster on SAVE AMERICA We’re not playing
item.description: Make Them Speak No Zombie Filibuster on SAVE AMERICA We’re not playing

item.title: @elonmusk: Exactly. It would be the end of democracy in America.
item.description: Exactly. It would be the end of democracy in America.

item.title: @elonmusk: Last night, Democrats couldn't even stand to support putting Americans first. It was nuts to watch! ...
item.description: Last night, Democrats couldn't even stand to support putting Americans first. It was nuts to watch! No wonder they’re opposed to the SAVE America Act! They want illegal aliens to vote in our elections because they’re a party that proudly puts illegals first and YOU LAST. We cannot stand for this! Putting America first isn’t a partisan issue — it simply means we prioritize what benefits the AMERICAN PEOPLE and keeps them safe. I can’t believe it’s come to this. We MUST pass the SAVE America Act and make sure every elected official stands for U.S. citizens' best interests, not illegal aliens.

item.title: @elonmusk: Excellent, comprehensive analysis of how the Senate can—and must—pass the SAVE America Act
item.description: Excellent, comprehensive analysis of how the Senate can—and must—pass the SAVE America Act

item.title: @elonmusk: Great news! Now it is time to enforce the talking filibuster. The filibuster rule is meant to allow ...
item.description: Great news! Now it is time to enforce the talking filibuster. The filibuster rule is meant to allow senators to present their arguments before a bill is passed. It is NOT intended to require 60 votes to pass anything at all! STOP THE ABUSE OF THE FILIBUSTER NOW. Either senators must talk or they must pass the bill to SAVE AMERICA!
